creator: ntarmos@cs.uoi.gr
text:
Thanks for the PR. As it is, the patch is incomplete as it misses some
pkg-plist changes (xcb-util v0.3.5 bumps libxcb-keysyms.so to version 1
and removes some .h and .so files). Moreover, v0.3.5 requires libxcb
compiled against xcb-proto >= 1.5 and there is still v1.4 in the ports
tree. I'm waiting for the xcb-proto update myself to submit the PR.

Cheers.

\n\n
